name: Consumer Credit Counseling Service of Chattanooga
description_short: Non-profit credit counseling agency serving Chattanooga and Tennessee River Valley for 40+ years, offering debt management, credit counseling, and housing counseling at no cost.
description_long:
CCCS of Chattanooga is a locally-based non-profit credit counseling organization that has operated for over 40 years in the Chattanooga and Tennessee River Valley region. The organization positions itself as the only locally-based non-profit credit counseling agency in its service area, with a track record of helping hundreds of thousands of people address financial challenges.

The organization offers a comprehensive suite of services including debt management programs designed to stop creditor calls and help clients become debt-free, credit and budget counseling to assess and revise household finances, housing counseling delivered by certified housing counselors, and assistance with first-time home buyer programs. They also provide a "My Virtual Counselor" tool that allows prospective clients to estimate savings on a debt management plan before meeting with a counselor. Additionally, they operate community financial literacy programs, as evidenced by their work with charter schools.

CCCS of Chattanooga differentiates itself through its non-profit status, local focus, certified counselor staff, "no judgment zone" approach, and extensive customer testimonials demonstrating successful outcomes. The organization emphasizes accessibility through free online appointments and multiple service channels. Their success stories highlight transformations including elimination of $20,000+ credit card debt and improved financial peace of mind.

The primary limitation is geographic scope—services are limited to the Chattanooga and Tennessee River Valley area. The website lacks specific details about program costs (though services appear to be free), typical timeframes for debt payoff, or how they compare to other NFCC-certified agencies. Client reviews are uniformly positive, which while encouraging, may not represent the full spectrum of outcomes.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Only locally-based non-profit credit counseling agency in the Chattanooga and Tennessee River Valley area, providing community-focused service
40+ years of operational history with hundreds of thousands of people helped, demonstrating sustained track record
Certified housing counselors on staff for foreclosure avoidance, reverse mortgage counseling, and first-time homebuyer programs
Free online appointments available for initial consultation and no-judgment approach to client interactions
My Virtual Counselor tool allows clients to calculate potential savings before committing to a debt management plan
Multiple verified success stories showing debt elimination and financial recovery (e.g., $20,000 credit card debt paid off)
Offers credit and budget counseling alongside debt management, providing comprehensive financial education
cons: Geographic limitation: services restricted to Chattanooga and Tennessee River Valley area only
Website does not clearly specify whether services are completely free or if fees apply for debt management programs
Limited transparency about typical debt payoff timelines or program success rates beyond anecdotal testimonials
No information provided about counselor certifications (NFCC, HUD, etc.) despite mentioning 'certified' status
Debt management plans typically require creditor cooperation, which is not guaranteed and may not be suitable for all debt types
best_for: Chattanooga and Tennessee River Valley residents with maxed-out credit cards seeking debt elimination through managed payment plans
Homebuyers in the service area needing first-time buyer education and housing counseling
Individuals facing foreclosure risk who need certified housing counseling intervention
People with multiple debts seeking comprehensive credit counseling and personalized budget planning
diagnosis: CCCS of Chattanooga is ideal for residents in its service area (Chattanooga and Tennessee River Valley) who have accumulated credit card debt or face housing challenges and want free, judgment-free counseling from a non-profit provider with four decades of experience. The main caveat is geographic limitation—this service is not accessible to consumers outside the Tennessee River Valley region.
services: Debt Management Programs with creditor negotiation and payment coordination
Credit and Budget Counseling with financial assessment and action planning
Housing Counseling delivered by certified housing counselors
Reverse mortgage education and equity leverage guidance
First-Time Home Buyer Programs and resources
My Virtual Counselor self-assessment tool for debt management savings estimation
Financial literacy community programs for students and schools
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 5600 Brainerd Rd Ste C-26, Chattanooga, TN 37411
